= uuid_v5





Generates a version 5 UUID from a namespace and name

== Parameters

*`ns`* &lt;string&gt; (optional) An optional namespace name or UUID. It supports the &#x60;dns&#x60;, &#x60;url&#x60;, &#x60;oid&#x60; and &#x60;x500&#x60; predefined namespaces and any valid RFC-9562 UUID. If empty, the nil UUID will be used.


== Examples

[,bloblang]
----
root.id = "example".uuid_v5()
----

[,bloblang]
----
root.id = "example".uuid_v5("x500")
----

[,bloblang]
----
root.id = "example".uuid_v5("77f836b7-9f61-46c0-851e-9b6ca3535e69")
----
